Duke Rodriguez, a former health care executive, Ultra Health CEO, and cabinet secretary under Gov. Gary Johnson, announced his candidacy over the weekend via newspaper ads in outlets like the Santa Fe New Mexican, joining six other candidates to succeed term-limited Gov. Michelle Lujan Grisham[1][2].
